body.title: PE chain block propagation — ticket_id unknown + adopt loop
body.result: Fixed: _pe_escalate recovers ticket_id from active GOAL; adopt_top_queue_ticket skips blocked_at tickets; cmd_reset clears blocked_at. 1875 tests pass.
body.description: _pe_escalate fails to block ticket when basket ticket_id is unknown. adopt_top_queue_ticket re-adopts blocked tickets. Fix: recover ticket_id in escalate, check blocked_at in adopt, clear blocked_at on manual reset.
